issues.description: Condition should be 'HasCardOnBoard' or a life count check, not 'TurnCount'. The effect triggers based on current Life card count (2 or less), not turn count.
Action type should be 'FlipLife' (add cards to Life cards), not 'SearchDeck'. The effect adds cards to Life, not to hand.
Destination should reflect Life cards, not 'hand'. Per DSL spec, FlipLife adds cards to Life cards.
Missing proper life count condition. Should check if controlling player has 2 or fewer Life cards (likely requires custom condition or max life parameter).

condition.description: You have 2 or less Life cards
